Index.meta_title: H&T AI TECH — AI Engineering Studio
Index.meta_description: Senior AI engineers who embed with your team, ship into your repo, and deliver production AI your operators can run.

Hero.title: AI Engineering Studio for your next growth stage
Hero.description: Senior engineers work with your roadmap, systems, and data to ship useful AI features your team can run — not demos that die after the pitch.

Proof.eyebrow: Signals you can inspect before a call

HomeServices.title: How teams work with us
HomeServices.description: Pick the lane that matches delivery risk. We staff and ship against it.

DeliveryProof.title: What has to exist before an AI system ships
DeliveryProof.item1_description: User decision, data path, approval point, and failure mode are explicit before implementation expands.
DeliveryProof.item2_description: The first release has known quality signals instead of demo-only confidence.
DeliveryProof.item3_description: Human review, permissions, logging, and fallback behavior are treated as launch scope.
DeliveryProof.item4_description: Adoption, reliability, latency, cost, and value stay visible after the system ships.

CTA.title: Bring the pilot, risk, and business goal
CTA.description: A senior operator will help decide whether the next step is a production AI sprint, an embedded engineer, an audit, or no-build advice.

HeroService.title: AI-native engineering capacity for production systems
HeroService.description: From embedded AI engineers to scoped product builds, agentic systems, data platforms, and cloud foundations — choose for shipped output.

HowweworkService.title: How an embedded AI engineer starts producing signal
HowweworkService.description: Clear operating ownership, short ramp, and capacity that scales only when the loop is working.

ServicesCatalog.hire_description: Add senior AI engineers who work in your repo and own production outcomes.
ServicesCatalog.product_description: Turn your AI pilot into software customers actually use — shipped and reliable.
ServicesCatalog.agentic_description: Embed multi-agent AI into your real product, with evals and review built in.
ServicesCatalog.cloud_description: Modernize your cloud and data foundation so it is ready for reliable AI.
ServicesCatalog.data_description: Permissions, semantic layers, retrieval, pipelines, and reporting that make AI useful against production data.
ServicesCatalog.ux_description: Streaming interfaces, review flows, dashboards, and internal tools operators can trust daily.
ServicesCatalog.vision_description: Field-ready detection and inspection systems with measurable accuracy and operating constraints.
ServicesCatalog.ml_description: Custom ML implementations with training loops, evaluation, and handover your team can run.
